name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that keeps your slides looking human, not algorithmic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, template-looking slides that undermine professional credibility. Teams waste time cleaning up AI-generated content that looks obviously automated. Chronicle 2.0 aims to deliver AI speed without the telltale visual and copy slop that makes audiences disengage.
useCases: Building investor decks that look custom-designed without a design team
Creating client-facing sales presentations quickly while maintaining brand quality
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks with minimal manual formatting
Turning reports or documents into polished slide narratives using AI drafting
